steps.name: Set start and end date: 01-05-2025 to 07-05-2025
Select '0802.062415 test request company' company using filter
Select '0802.062415 test request merchant' business unit using filter
Select currency USD from dropdown menu
Select Card type 'VISA' from dropdown menu
Verify: merchant ID is sent to the server
